arts.ttl: Girona star left in tears after setting unwanted UCL record in heartbreaking PSG defeat
arts.sum: Girona star Paulo Gazzaniga on Wednesday night secured for himself a place in the history books of Spanish football. Unfortunately for the shot-stopper, however, as much came for altogether less…

arts.ttl: PSG Relieved as Liverpool Star Is Real Madrid’s Top Right-Back Target, Report Says
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could be breathing a sigh of relief as Real Madrid look to pursue other right-back targets besides Achraf Hakimi. In June, The Athletic’s Mario Cortegana revealed that Real Madrid are considering Hakimi as Dani Carvajal’s long-term replacement. Additionally, the Spanish side see the Moroccan as a strong candidate for their right-back position. arts.ttl: Photo: Ousmane Dembélé’s Baffling Decision Costs PSG a Key Scoring Opportunity Against Girona
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé has started the 2024-25 season in outstanding form, with three goals and two assists in just four Ligue 1 games. However, the 27-year-old winger had a head-scratching moment during Paris Saint-Germain’s UEFA Champions League match against Girona. arts.ttl: Tottenham Set to Offer New Contract to €65M-Rated Man Utd, Real Madrid Summer Target Amid PSG Interest
arts.sum: Over the past summer transfer window, Paris Saint-Germain sought a central defender and secured Willian Pacho from Eintracht Frankfurt. The Parisians paid €40 million for the Ecuadorian as the capital club continues to inject more youth into the central defense. Nonetheless, another center-back was also on their list. arts.ttl: PSG vs Girona: Preview, predictions and lineup
arts.sum: PSG predicted lineup vs Girona (4-3-3): Safonov; Hakimi, Marquinhos, Pacho, Mendes; Vitinha, Neves, Fabian; Dembele, Asensio, Barcola. Girona make their Champions League debut on Wednesday night as they travel to Paris Saint-Germain on Matchday 1 of the all-new league phase.

arts.ttl: Could Girona and Manchester City both play in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Girona and City are two of the clubs encompassed by the City Football Group ( the Spanish team being acquired in 2017 ), in which the Emirati-based Abu Dhabi United Group holds an 81% stake, while the remaining share is owned by the American fund, Silver Lake, a major player headquartered in Palo Alto with investments spanning various domains. And secondly, if they, at least, remain in the top positions in the standings, as looks likely, would they be able to compete in the Champions League despite sharing ownership with Manchester City, who will almost certainly be there?
